long_description: A comprehensive MCP server for Cloudinary's Media Generation API. Generate images from text prompts using various AI models including FLUX, Recraft, GPT Image, and Nano Banana.
name: @cloudinary/media-generation-mcp

api_key.description: Your Cloudinary API key. Found in Dashboard → Settings → Access Keys.
api_key.title: API Key

api_secret.description: Your Cloudinary API secret. Found in Dashboard → Settings → Access Keys.
api_secret.title: API Secret

cloud_name.description: Your Cloudinary cloud name. Find it in your Cloudinary Dashboard.
cloud_name.title: Cloud Name

tools.name: generation-generate-image
tools.description:
Generate Image

Generate an image from a text prompt using AI models.

The API resolves which model to invoke using a layered override system:
1. If `explicit_model` is provided, use that exact model.
2. If `model_family` + `quality_tier` are provided, look up the model in the Model Matrix.
3. If only `model_family` is provided, default to `quality_tier: "standard"`.
4. If no model params are provided, use the global default (nano_banana / standard).

tools.name: tasks-get-generation-task-status
tools.description:
Get generation task status

Get the status of a generation task.
